name: Creator Course Kit
headline: A creator storefront for selling a course, membership, or workshop offer
idealFor: Creators, coaches, educators, and audience-led businesses
description: A productized creator site with launch narrative, curriculum highlights, social proof, and mobile-first purchase sections.
deliveryCopy: Includes sales page sections, program modules, FAQ, and credibility blocks.
bullets: Built to sell digital products with clearer story flow
Module sections, testimonials, and purchase CTA bands included
Works for cohorts, self-paced courses, and memberships

sections.title: Story-led launch page
sections.description: The structure balances authority, aspiration, and practical details so the offer feels more credible.

sections.title: Higher-trust conversion
sections.description: Buyers see what is included, why it matters, and what the next step is without hunting through long copy.

sections.title: Easy to repurpose
sections.description: Swap the curriculum, testimonials, and media to create multiple creator offers from one system.

media.title: A sales-page kit for audience-driven offers
media.body: Ship a better course page, workshop funnel, or membership launch site without rebuilding every section by hand.
